EN-ES Printable Resource

K-2 Classroom Furniture Labels (English-Spanish)

Bilingual labels for common classroom furniture, designed for K-2 ELL newcomers to support language acquisition and classroom orientation.

TopicClassroom Furniture
Age BandK-2
Pack Typeclassroom labels
LanguageEN-ES

✨ What's Inside

  • 15 classroom labels
  • 5 routine cards
  • 4 classroom rules
  • Teacher notes & answer key

📖 How to Use

Print full-size labels for larger furniture items and walls. Print small-size labels for bins, smaller furniture pieces, or specific areas. Display visual routine cards in a prominent sequence. Post classroom rules at eye level. Encourage students to point to labels as they interact with items or follow routines.

Mar 18, 2026lanternell.comPage 5 / 6
LanternELLTeacher Notes📄 Printable Pack

Teacher Notes

🎯 Objective

To support K-2 ELL newcomers in identifying common classroom furniture, understanding daily routines, and adhering to classroom rules through bilingual visual labels.

💡 Suggested Use

Print full-size labels for larger furniture items and walls. Print small-size labels for bins, smaller furniture pieces, or specific areas. Display visual routine cards in a prominent sequence. Post classroom rules at eye level. Encourage students to point to labels as they interact with items or follow routines.

📦 Materials Needed

  • Printer
  • Cardstock
  • Laminator
  • Scissors
  • Adhesive (tape, velcro, glue dots)

🔀 Differentiation Tips

  • Use gestures and repetition when introducing new labels.
  • Create a scavenger hunt for students to find labeled items.
  • Pair students for peer support in identifying labels.
  • Incorporate labels into daily games or activities (e.g., 'Simon Says' using furniture names).
  • Encourage students to use the L1 and L2 terms.
📄 Terms of Use — personal-classroom-use
✅ Print for your students & classroom use.❌ Do not share, redistribute, or resell files.🏫 School license: support@lanternell.com
